10543082.title: CNN Newsroom Saturday
10543082.description: Updates of the latest news from around the world.

10545817.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
10545817.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes that use stale bread as the key ingredient.

10546022.title: Inside Africa
10546022.description: Reports on African political and social issues from host Isha Sesay and correspondents across the continent.

10546888.title: African Voices: Changemakers
10546888.description: An exploration of the changemakers in Africa who are coming up with innovative ways to have a positive impact on their communities.

10547025.title: Living Golf
10547025.description: Previewing the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, a look at Japan's unique golfing culture.

10547887.title: Marketplace Africa
10547887.description: Offering unique insights into African market's latest information while observing the events and developments that impact the business world.

10548008.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
10548008.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

10549037.title: Quest's World of Wonder
10549037.description: Perched on the rocky cliffs above a shimmering sea are medieval ramparts, nearly perfectly intact, protecting a gem inside. Exploring the real heart and soul of Dubrovnik in Croatia.

10549934.title: African Voices: Changemakers
10549934.description: An exploration of the changemakers in Africa who are coming up with innovative ways to have a positive impact on their communities.

10554830.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
10554830.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

10555835.title: Inside Politics
10555835.description: With veteran Washington correspondent John King in the anchor chair, `Inside Politics' focuses on the top political stories of the day with a rotating round table of top sourced reporters from CNN and from other media outlets. The half-hour program gives viewers an inside look at the stories driving Washington, directly from reporters on the ground. Prior to its revival in 2014, `Inside Politics' was first headed by Judy Woodruff, and it aired for more than 20 years on CNN before its cancellation in 2005.

10556798.title: State of the Union With Jake Tapper
10556798.description: Newsmakers and Washington power players discuss current issues and events, with additional commentary by a panel of reporters and analysts. Hosted by Jake Tapper, the Sunday morning program also goes beyond the Beltway for a perspective on how everyday Americans are faring in today's world.

10556998.title: Fareed Zakaria GPS
10556998.description: Host, columnist, and best-selling author Fareed Zakaria offers insightful analysis and interviews world leaders, artists, scientists, business leaders, global affairs analysts, and other cultural observers for the `Global Public Square'. Zakaria is also a syndicated columnist for The Washington Post, a contributing editor for The Atlantic magazine, and hosts in-depth, prime-time specials for CNN Worldwide. `Fareed Zakaria GPS' was launched in 2008 and each week's program airs worldwide on CNN, from New York or other locations around the world. The program is characterized by smart debate and discussion on world events and public affairs, designed to help viewers understand the world around them and the newest thinking on the globe's biggest challenges.

10557950.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
10557950.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

10559978.title: Marketplace Europe
10559978.description: Anna Stewart takes a looks at the companies developing boundary breaking technologies at the Goodwood Festival's Future Lab and speaks to the head of Space Systems for Airbus, Jean-Marc Nasr.

10560777.title: Marketplace Asia
10560777.description: While spectators will be barred from attending the Tokyo Olympic Games, billions across the world will be using technology to tune in, making the Olympic Games a space for innovation.
